# PERF-171 positive: make(chan struct{}, 1) used as a mutex
lang: go
file: PERF-171-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Counter struct {
	mu chan struct{}
	n  int
}

func New() *Counter {
	return &Counter{mu: make(chan struct{}, 1)}
}

func (c *Counter) Inc() {
	c.mu <- struct{}{}
	c.n++
	<-c.mu
}
